page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A novel image-based protein subcellular location multi-label prediction model based on multi-scale monogenic signal representation and intensity encoding strategy.

The dataset for MIC_Locator can be downloaded from the website (https://pan.baidu.com/s/1dvvyT9OuJUcQYkCxidABDw)
